description: Pedagogical Dimensions System - Science-based, updatable configuration for training session design

metadata.author: GoAtleta Coaching System
sources: Schmidt & Lee (2020) - Motor Control and Learning

baixa.label: Blocked Practice
baixa.description: Identical repetitions in controlled environment. Motor planning phase.

media.label: Variable Practice
media.description: Same task, different contexts. Skill consolidation.
media.scientificBasis: Schmidt & Lee (2020) - contextual interference, intermediate stage

alta.label: Random/Variable Practice
alta.description: Diverse tasks and conditions. Transfer and generalization.
alta.scientificBasis: Schmidt & Lee (2020) - advanced learning and transfer

baixa.label: Decontextualized Drills
baixa.description: Isolated, controlled environment. Technique refinement focus.

alta.label: Game-Realistic Conditions
alta.description: Constraints match match environment. Transfer to competition.
alta.scientificBasis: Ecological Dynamics - affordances and constraints learning

baixa.label: Coach-Directed, Low Autonomy
baixa.description: Coach sets all decisions. Learner focuses on execution.
baixa.scientificBasis: Constraint-Led Approach - environmental constraints guide learning

media.label: Guided Choices
media.description: Coach sets constraints, learner makes choices within bounds.

baixa.label: Simple Motor Patterns
baixa.scientificBasis: Fitts & Posner (1967) - cognitive stage, Newell (1986) - task constraints

alta.label: Complex Multi-Element Sequences
alta.description: High coordination and cognitive demand. Advanced technique.

baixa.label: Low Frequency
baixa.scientificBasis: Schmidt & Lee (2020) - reduced relative error dependency

alta.label: High Frequency
alta.description: Immediate feedback per repetition or per rally.
alta.scientificBasis: Schmidt & Lee (2020) - early learning stage guidance

ageProfiles.comment: Base dimension profiles derived from age (stage of motor development). No performance adjustment yet.

8-11.label: 8-11 years (Iniciação)
8-11.rationale: Early childhood motor development; need motor planning + technique foundation; high external guidance

10-12.label: 10-12 years (Transição Iniciação→Formação)
10-12.rationale: Moderate baseline experience; variable practice for consolidation; still high feedback

12-14.label: 12-14 years (Formação)
12-14.rationale: Approaching adolescence; ready for game-realistic training; moderate autonomy; moderate feedback

14+.label: 14+ years (Especialização/Competitive)
14+.rationale: High motor experience; game-realistic demands; high autonomy; learner self-monitors

levelAdjustments.comment: Adjustments applied per class level (1=iniciação, 2=formação, 3=competitivo). Add deltas to age profile.

1.label: Level 1 (Iniciação)
1.rationale: No adjustment; age profile is primary

2.label: Level 2 (Formação)
2.rationale: Advance towards higher variability, realism, autonomy; reduce feedback dependency

3.label: Level 3 (Competitive/Especialização)
3.rationale: Maximize variability, realism, autonomy; minimize feedback (self-monitoring)

phaseModifiers.comment: Adjustments based on periodization phase. Applied after age + level composition.

fundamentos.label: Fundamentos (Skill Foundation)
fundamentos.rationale: Focus on technique; reduce game-realism; increase feedback for technique refinement

consolidacao.label: Consolidação (Consolidation)
consolidacao.rationale: Neutral; slight increase in realism + autonomy

especializacao.label: Especialização (Specialization)
especializacao.rationale: Increase game-realism, decision load, complexity; reduce feedback

competicao.label: Competição (Competition)
competicao.rationale: Maximize game-realism + variability; minimize feedback (match conditions)

refinementRules.comment: Rules to refine base profile based on pedagogical evaluation (gap, trend, consistency). Applied if sampleConfidence >= 'medio'.

rules.description: Critical gap with low consistency → increase feedback
Trending upward with high consistency → increase representativeness
Critical gap but high basic consistency → increase task complexity
Declining trend with low consistency → revert to lower variability + increase feedback
Plateauing with medium consistency → increase variability or representativeness

safetyGates.action: BLOCK all adjustments; return baseProfile unmodified
safetyGates.description: Insufficient sample size or reliability to adjust; defer to base profile

changeLogs.changes: Initial pedagogical dimensions system. 5 dimensions (variability, representativeness, decisionMaking, taskComplexity, feedbackFrequency) with 3 levels each. 4 age profiles (8-11, 10-12, 12-14, 14+). 3 level adjustments. 4 phase modifiers. 5 refinement rules + safety gates.
changeLogs.motivation: Transform GoAtleta from static author-anchored pedagogy to science-driven, updatable system. Dimensions derive from motor learning consensus (Schmidt & Lee, Ecological Dynamics, Constraint-Led Approach).
